channel.title: Pitaka Blog
channel.description: Personal finance tips, budgeting strategies, and money management insights from Pitaka.

item.title: How to Create a Budget That Actually Works
item.description: Learn proven budgeting techniques and strategies to take control of your finances, build wealth, and achieve your financial goals.

item.title: 7 Proven Ways to Increase Your Savings Rate This Year
item.description: Actionable strategies to save more money without sacrificing your lifestyle or financial freedom.

item.title: Track Your Spending Like a Pro: The Complete Guide
item.description: Master personal finance tracking with proven techniques, tools, and strategies used by successful savers.

item.title: 10 Mistakes Everyone Makes with Investments (and How to Fix Them)
item.description: Learn the most common investment mistakes and practical strategies to avoid them on your path to wealth.

item.title: Emergency Fund 101: How Much, Where, and Why It Matters
item.description: Build financial security with a proper emergency fund strategy that protects you from life's unexpected costs.
